hero.title: Manage your projects
hero.subtitle: Photos, time tracking, quotes and invoices — all in one place. The professional tool that replaces your notebook, WhatsApp and Excel.

features.title: Everything you need
features.subtitle: A complete tool built for the job site. Manage every aspect of your projects from your phone or computer.

projects.title: Project management
projects.description: Create and organise your projects with statuses, notes and client information. Get a clear overview at a glance.

photos.title: Photos & documents
photos.description: Take photos directly on site, annotate them and share them with your clients.

time.title: Time tracking
time.description: Log your hours per project. Detailed reports for accurate invoicing.

invoices.title: Quotes & invoices
invoices.description: Generate professional, compliant quotes and invoices in a few clicks.

sharing.title: Client sharing
sharing.description: A magic link for your clients to follow progress in real time. Zero friction.

team.title: Teamwork
team.description: Invite your colleagues and work together on the same projects.

steps.title: Up and running in 2 minutes
steps.subtitle: Three steps are all you need to digitalise your project management.

step1.title: Create your account
step1.description: Free sign-up in 30 seconds with Google or by email.

step2.title: Add a project
step2.description: Enter the project details and invite your client.

step3.title: Manage everything in one place
step3.description: Photos, hours, materials and invoices — all centralised and accessible.

mobileApp.title: OpenChantier in your pocket
mobileApp.subtitle: The OpenChantier mobile app is coming very soon to iOS and Android. Take photos, log hours and manage your projects directly from the job site.

pricing.title: Simple and transparent
pricing.subtitle: No hidden fees. Start for free, go Pro when you're ready.

pro.name: Pro
pro.description: For tradespeople who want to manage everything

cta.title: Ready to simplify your day?
cta.subtitle: Join the tradespeople already managing their projects with OpenChantier. It's free.

footer.description: The project management solution designed for construction tradespeople.

seo.title: OpenChantier — Construction Management Software for Tradespeople
seo.description: OpenChantier is the all-in-one app for construction teams: project management, site photos, time tracking, online quoting and invoicing.
seo.keywords: contractor, construction, project management, software, SaaS, invoicing, time tracking, job site, mobile app
